pages.title: Meet ShelvesAI
pages.subtitle: Your collections, alive and social
pages.body: Scan, catalog, and show off the collections you love with a little magic.

pages.title: Organize Faster
pages.subtitle: Capture items in seconds
pages.body: Snap a photo of your whole shelf, or search, to fill your digital catalog without the manual work.

pages.title: Discover & Connect
pages.subtitle: Follow collectors like you
pages.body: See what friends add, discover new passions, and build your collector circle.

pages.title: Check-in & Track
pages.subtitle: Share what you're up to
pages.body: Let your friends or the world know what you're currently watching, reading, or playing.

required.title: Complete your profile
required.subtitle: We need a few details to get you started.

optional.title: Add the finishing touches
optional.subtitle: Bio and photo are optional for now.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please review and accept our Terms before continuing.
terms.agreeLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service
terms.requiredError: You must accept the Terms of Service to continue.

username.title: Choose a Username
username.subtitle: This is how other collectors will find you
username.errorShort: Username must be at least 3 characters

uiTour.screenSubtitle: A quick tour of your navigation

steps.label: Profile
steps.title: Your Profile
steps.body: View your collection stats, manage account settings, and connect with friends — all from here.

steps.label: Home
steps.title: Your Feed
steps.body: See what friends are collecting and checking in. Discover new items from people you follow.

steps.title: Quick Actions
steps.body: Tap + to add items to a shelf, check in to a spot, or search for new friends.

steps.label: Shelves
steps.title: Your Collection
steps.body: Browse and manage your shelves. Scan new items, view your collection, and edit details.

newShelfTutorial.title: Create Your First Shelf
newShelfTutorial.subtitle: Let's get your collection started
newShelfTutorial.body: It's time to create your first shelf! Give it a name, select the type of items or collectibles you'll track on it, and then set the visibility settings. Then, when you're ready, take a photo of your collection and try it out!
